item.title: HUGE 32" Pizza Challenge
item.description: This one gets wild fast — watch the mountain disappear piece by piece.

media:content.media:title: HUGE 32" Pizza Challenge
media:content.media:description: This one gets wild fast — watch the mountain disappear piece by piece.

item.title: 72oz Steak Challenge: No Freakin Way
item.description: Big meat, big pressure—watch this one go down to the wire.

media:content.media:title: 72oz Steak Challenge: No Freakin Way
media:content.media:description: Big meat, big pressure—watch this one go down to the wire.

item.title: 7lb BBQ Horseshoe Challenge
item.description: This plate looks unreal — wait for the final bite. A big BBQ challenge with plenty of flavor and a fun finish.

media:content.media:title: 7lb BBQ Horseshoe Challenge
media:content.media:description: This plate looks unreal — wait for the final bite. A big BBQ challenge with plenty of flavor and a fun finish.

item.title: Hot Sauce BBQ Beast Challenge
item.description: Watch how far this one goes before the heat hits in this BBQ food challenge.

media:content.media:title: Hot Sauce BBQ Beast Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch how far this one goes before the heat hits in this BBQ food challenge.

item.title: 15-Minute Food Challenge
item.description: Watch the clock and see if the plate disappears before time does.

media:content.media:description: Watch the clock and see if the plate disappears before time does.

item.title: $1000 Godzadilla Food Challenge
item.description: A big food challenge with a $1000 prize and plenty of flavor. Can it be finished?

media:content.media:title: $1000 Godzadilla Food Challenge
media:content.media:description: A big food challenge with a $1000 prize and plenty of flavor. Can it be finished?

item.title: Pasta Mountain Food Challenge
item.description: Would you take one look and dive in, or tap out instantly? A fun spaghetti challenge with a huge pasta mountain.

media:content.media:title: Pasta Mountain Food Challenge
media:content.media:description: Would you take one look and dive in, or tap out instantly? A fun spaghetti challenge with a huge pasta mountain.
